#  Reorder Drawings Within a Discipline 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * When you reorder drawings in the Drawings tool, the new order will be displayed for everyone who can access the Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click the **vertical ellipsis** ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon for a discipline and select **Reorder Drawings**.
  3. Click and drag over the **reorder** ![Icon Reorder](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7134434bbf9d83bd88e5e5ddd142310c/8943eff1fce6b93b00f319a4712aafd4/icon-reorder.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon for a drawing to move it to a new position.  
![Reorder Table Rows4](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c6f15d2e473cb136bc196a335d4dccab/8582ed4d41a15ca350cae27fbd0a19a1/reorder-table-rows4.png?fm=webp)
  4. Continue moving drawings as necessary.
  5. Click **Confirm**.


## See Also

  * [Email Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/email-drawings)
  * [Move Drawing Disciplines](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/move-drawing-disciplines)
title: Reorder Drawings Within a Discipline
description: How to reorder drawings in your project's Drawings log.
